summary: Smoke-tested Healing Frequencies app (backend + frontend). All core flows working: auth (register/login/admin/logout), Solfeggio presets, custom freq slider, waveform toggle, play/pause + countdown timer, save/load/delete sessions, dashboard render. Backend endpoints (/api/auth/*, /api/sessions GET/POST/DELETE) returned 200 with both Bearer header and httpOnly cookie auth.
passed: UI: Register new user -> auto-logged-in dashboard renders
UI: Solfeggio 528 Hz preset updates current-frequency to 528.0Hz
UI: Custom frequency slider updates frequency display in realtime (528 -> 538 after arrow keys)
UI: Play/Pause starts countdown (10:00 -> 09:59); pause stops it
UI: Save session adds item to Saved Sessions
UI: Delete session removes saved item
UI: Logout returns to auth screen
UI: Admin login (admin@example.com/admin123) lands on dashboard with 'Hello, Admin'
notes: Binaural offset slider, ambient sliders, duration slider, breathwork toggle, load-saved-session not exhaustively exercised in this smoke pass but underlying components render and primary flow works. No console errors observed. Web Audio output not verified (expected in headless mode). CORS + cookie auth working across origin.
